mapper.insert: INSERT INTO favorite (user_id, item_id, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{itemId}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT f.id, f.item_id, f.create_time, i.item_name, i.images, i.unit_price, i.sale_status FROM favorite f LEFT JOIN item i ON f.item_id = i.id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY f.create_time DESC
